sentiment.reasoning: Raising outlook based on strong demand provides a clear positive signal for both immediate and sustained financial performance.

headlines.headline: Pleven Trading Co secures $180M contract with a global retailer

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
